studyName: Genome-Wide Association of Type 2 Diabetes in Africans: The AADM Study

tables.description: This subject phenotypes dataset for study phase 3 includes study step, study phase, and Chem_ID associated with the Chemical Annotation Discovery 5b1 document (n=1115 variables).
This subject phenotypes dataset for study phase 2 includes study step, study phase, and Chem_ID associated with document Chemical Annotation Replication 5b2 (n=1070 variables).
This subject phenotypes dataset for study phase 3 includes study step, study phase, and Chem_ID associated with document Chemical Annotation Merged 5b3 (n=890 variables).
This subject phenotypes dataset includes case control status for type 2 diabetes, glycemic control, and self-reported race.

variables.name: DIABETES_STATUS
variables.description: Case control status of the subject for type 2 diabetes

tables.description: This sample attributes table includes body site, analyte type, and tumor status.

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

tables.description: The subject consent dataset contains subject IDs, consent group information, and biological sex.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

tables.description: This subject sample mapping data table includes a mapping of study subject IDs to sample IDs. Samples are the final preps submitted for genotyping, sequencing, and/or expression data. For example, if one patient (subject ID) gave one sample, and that sample was processed differently to generate 2 sequencing runs, there would be two rows, both using the same subject ID, but having 2 unique sample IDs.
The sample SRA linking data table includes a mapping of sample IDs to publicly available sequence data accession ID.
